text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Flash, happy birthday! ☆ Anything you want me
to do for you?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Consider this a thank-you gift for waking me up
every day—so I'm all ears! ☆

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
...Anything, you say? Then there is one thing I'd
like to ask of you.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to write up a thorough daily schedule for
you. As such, I'd like to ask for your sleep hours,
travel time, meal time, training—the works, all
down to the last second.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Th-that might be a little difficult—or even
impossible—for cute lil' Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: S-so... how about this? I'll sing you a birthday song in exactly ten seconds!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe. I'm sorry, that was ein Scherz—a joke. You did say anything, so I couldn't help myself.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wha... Sometimes I really can't tell whether
you're joking or not...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That said, I am interested in hearing your
ten-second birthday song, so if you would.
